individual.title: Strictly Individual Pet Sitting

cards.title: Only your pet
cards.text: Strictly individual sitting — we only take animals from one owner. No other pets around at the same time.

cards.title: Daily reports
cards.text: Photos and videos every day. You always know what your pet is doing and how they feel.

cards.title: Home environment
cards.text: Living together in a home, walks, and play. Your pet won't be lonely or bored.

cards.title: Around-the-clock care
cards.text: We're there day and night. The pet is never left alone — always supervised.

cards.title: Familiar routine
cards.text: Feeding on your schedule with their favourite food and toys. Minimum stress, maximum comfort.

cards.title: 24/7 contact
cards.text: Always reachable. Message any time — we reply quickly with photos or videos of your pet.

items.title: Evening rest
items.desc: Murzik settled in his favourite spot

guests.title: Our regular guests
guests.subtitle: They come back again and again

items.text: Murzik stayed with us for 10 days. The first day he was a little sad, but then settled in, found his favourite windowsill spot and ate well. Anna received photos every day and felt at ease.
Bobby is an energetic Labrador. We walked 2 hours a day and played fetch. Sergey left on a business trip knowing his dog was in safe hands — and had the whole place to himself.
items.individual: The whole home just for him

items.text: Ryzhik is with us for the 12th time! He walks in like it's home — heads straight to his bowl. Maria says the cat always comes back calm and happy.

reviews.title: Owner reviews
reviews.subtitle: They trusted us with their most precious ones

items.name: Anna K.
items.text: Left my cat for 10 days. Got a photo and short video every morning. The cat came back calm and happy. The best part — he was the only pet, no stress from strange animals!

items.name: Sergey M.
items.text: Was on a business trip for 2 weeks. Bobby lived like the sole owner of the apartment — no other dogs. Came back in a great mood. Will definitely use again!

items.name: Maria T.
items.text: Ryzhik is with you for the 12th time! I value the individual approach most — the cat is always the only guest. You can feel the genuine care and love for animals.

items.name: Dmitry P.
items.text: Golden Retrievers are social dogs, but it's still great knowing he's not with strange dogs — he's in a cosy home environment, one-on-one with the sitters.

items.q: Do you really only take one pet at a time?
items.a: Yes, it's a firm rule. We accept animals from one owner only. Your pet will be the sole guest — no other animals around.

items.q: How often do you send reports?
items.a: Every day — a morning photo and an evening video. If something interesting happens, we message right away. You always know how your pet is doing.

items.q: What should I bring for my pet?
items.a: Their usual food, favourite toys, and a bed if available. The more familiar items, the less stress for the animal.

items.q: How do I hand over my pet?
items.a: We meet in person. You tell us about your pet's habits, routine, and preferences. You leave a vet contact in case of emergency.
We specialise in cats and dogs. For other animals — please ask in advance via message.

items.q: What if my pet gets sick?
items.a: We contact you and your vet immediately and follow your instructions. Your pet's health is the top priority.

cta.title: Entrust your pet to us
cta.subtitle: Your loved one will be the only guest — in comfort and care
cta.note: Quick replies · Only one pet at a time · Reports every day
